candidate.objective: Well-organised and motivated professional with extensive experience in childcare, early childhood education, reception, and administration. Committed to delivering excellent customer service and building high-quality relationships with children, families, and colleagues. Holds Certificate III and Certificate II in Childcare and a Certificate in Community and Health Services. Demonstrates strong communication skills, excellent time management, and a consistent record of reliability and professionalism across diverse workplace environments.

employment.employer: Midland School for Early Childhood Development
duties: Cleaned and maintained early childhood centre facilities.
Handled money and maintained financial records.
Managed occupational health and safety procedures, including incident reports.
Provided child minding and supervision.
Administered first aid when required.
Managed opening and closing of the centre.

skills.detail: Extensive experience across multiple early childhood centres including Swan Valley Childcare, Froggie's Early Learning Centre, Kids on Beaufort, and Midland School for Early Childhood Development. Skilled in child supervision, development recording, and family relationship management.

Consistent record of delivering excellent customer service across childcare, retail, hospitality, and administration roles. Skilled in handling customer enquiries, complaints, and relationship management.
Experienced in reception duties, data entry, phone management, cash handling, and administrative record keeping. Roles include Creche Manager, Administrator, and Receptionist.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills developed across diverse environments. Experienced communicating with children, parents, carers, and managers.
Excellent organisational skills and strong time management. Self-motivated and capable of managing competing priorities efficiently.
